steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Left of the blank: the noun phrase “Such a compensatory measure.” Right of the blank: the noun phrase “the organelle's decline” followed by the main verb “offers.” The blank must not introduce a second independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the grammatical rule
steps.content:
The participle form “counteracting” modifies the noun “measure” as part of the subject phrase, allowing “offers” to remain the sole main verb.

Choices A, B, and C are all finite verbs; using any of them would create a second main verb separated from “offers” by only a comma, resulting in a comma splice.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
